entries.name: Vengeful Retreat
entries.desc: Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take 5 Physical damage.

entries.name: Felblade
entries.desc:
Charge to your target and deal 43 Fire damage.

Generates 15 Fury.

entries.name: Sigil of Misery
entries.desc:
Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.

entries.name: Vengeful Bonds
entries.desc: Vengeful Retreat reduces the movement speed of all nearby enemies by 70% for 3 sec.

entries.name: Unrestrained Fury
entries.desc: Increases maximum Fury by 20.

entries.name: Shattered Restoration
entries.desc: The healing of Shattered Souls is increased by 10%.

entries.name: Improved Sigil of Misery
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Sigil of Misery by 30 sec.

entries.name: Bouncing Glaives
entries.desc: Throw Glaive ricochets to 1 additional target.

entries.name: Imprison
entries.desc: Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.

entries.name: Charred Warblades
entries.desc: You heal for 3% of all Fire damage you deal.

entries.name: Chaos Nova
entries.desc: Unleash an eruption of fel energy, dealing 9 Chaos damage and stunning all nearby enemies for 3 sec.

entries.name: Improved Disrupt
entries.desc: Increases the range of Disrupt to 10 yds.

entries.name: Consume Magic
entries.desc: Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target.

entries.name: Aldrachi Design
entries.desc: Increases your chance to parry by 3%.

entries.name: Focused Ire
entries.desc: The primary target of Chaos Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.

entries.name: Master of the Glaive
entries.desc: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Champion of the Glaive
entries.desc: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and 10 yard increased range.

entries.name: Disrupting Fury
entries.desc: Disrupt generates 30 Fury on a successful interrupt.

entries.name: Blazing Path
entries.desc: Shift gains an additional charge.

entries.name: Swallowed Anger
entries.desc: Consume Magic generates 20 Fury when a beneficial Magic effect is successfully removed from the target.

entries.name: Aura of Pain
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Immolation Aura by 6%.

entries.name: Live by the Glaive
entries.desc:
When you parry an attack or have one of your attacks parried, restore 2% of max health and 10 Fury. 

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

entries.name: Pursuit
entries.desc: Mastery increases your movement speed.

entries.name: Soul Rending
entries.desc:
Leech increased by 6%.

Gain an additional 6% leech while Metamorphosis is active.

entries.name: Felfire Haste
entries.desc: Fel Rush increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Infernal Armor
entries.desc: Immolation Aura increases your armor by 20% and causes melee attackers to suffer 4 Fire damage.

entries.name: Burn It Out
entries.desc: Immolation Aura removes 1 Disease effect.

entries.name: Soul Cleanse
entries.desc: Immolation Aura removes 1 Curse effect.

entries.name: Lost in Darkness
entries.desc: Spectral Sight has 5 sec reduced cooldown and no longer reduces movement speed.

entries.name: Illidari Knowledge
entries.desc: Reduces magic damage taken by 3%.

entries.name: Felbound
entries.desc: Your movement speed is increased by 3%.

entries.name: Will of the Illidari
entries.desc: Increases maximum health by 3%.

entries.name: Internal Struggle
entries.desc: Increases your mastery by 2.6%.

entries.name: Furious
entries.desc: Attacks and abilities that generate Fury deal 3% increased damage.

entries.name: Remorseless
entries.desc: Attacks and abilities that spend Fury deal 3% increased damage.

entries.name: First In, Last Out
entries.desc: Shift grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Erratic Felheart
entries.desc: The cooldown of Fel Rush is reduced by 1.0 sec.

entries.name: Final Breath
entries.desc: Fully channeling Void Ray increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.

entries.name: Darkness
entries.desc:
Summons darkness around you in an 8 yd radius, granting friendly targets a 15% chance to avoid all damage from an attack. Lasts 8 sec.

Chance to avoid damage increased by 100% when not in a raid.

entries.name: Demon Muzzle
entries.desc: Interrupting a spell with Disrupt decreases your magic damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.

entries.name: Soul Splitter
entries.desc: Any time you would generate one or more Soul Fragments, you have a 2% chance to generate an additional Soul Fragment.

entries.name: Wings of Wrath
entries.desc: Glide speed increased by 10%.

entries.name: Long Night
entries.desc: Increases the duration of Darkness by 3 sec.

entries.name: Pitch Black
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Darkness by 120 sec.

entries.name: Demonic Resilience
entries.desc: Blur gains 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Eye Beam
entries.desc: Blasts all enemies in front of you, for up to 282 Chaos damage over 1.8 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

entries.name: Critical Chaos
entries.desc: The chance that Chaos Strike will refund 20 Fury is increased by 30% of your critical strike chance.

entries.name: Burning Hatred
entries.desc: Immolation Aura generates an additional 24 Fury over 6 sec.

entries.name: Dash of Chaos
entries.desc: For 2 sec after using Fel Rush, activating it again will dash back towards your initial location.

entries.name: Improved Chaos Strike
entries.desc: Chaos Strike damage increased by 10%.

entries.name: First Blood
entries.desc: Blade Dance deals 96 Chaos damage to the first target struck.

entries.name: Accelerated Blade
entries.desc: Throw Glaive deals 60% increased damage, reduced by 30% for each previous enemy hit.

entries.name: Demon Hide
entries.desc: Magical damage increased by 3%, and Physical damage taken reduced by 5%.

entries.name: Desperate Instincts
entries.desc:
Blur now reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.

Additionally, damage taken below 35% Health is reduced by 10%.

entries.name: Deflecting Dance
entries.desc: You deflect incoming attacks while Blade Dancing, absorbing damage up to 15% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Mortal Dance
entries.desc: Blade Dance now reduces targets' healing received by 50% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Initiative
entries.desc:
Damaging an enemy before they damage you increases your critical strike chance by 10% for 5 sec.

Vengeful Retreat refreshes your potential to trigger this effect on any enemies you are in combat with.

entries.name: Scars of Suffering
entries.desc: Increases Versatility by 4% and reduces threat generated by 8%.

entries.name: Demonic
entries.desc: Eye Beam causes you to enter demon form for 5 sec after it finishes dealing damage.

entries.name: Furious Throws
entries.desc: Throw Glaive now costs 25 Fury and throws a second glaive at the target.

entries.name: Trail of Ruin
entries.desc: The final slash of Blade Dance inflicts an additional 25 Chaos damage over 4 sec.

entries.name: Tactical Retreat
entries.desc: Vengeful Retreat has a 5 sec reduced cooldown and generates 80 Fury over 10 sec.

entries.name: Blind Fury
entries.desc: Eye Beam generates 30 Fury every second, has 10% increased duration, and deals 10% increased damage.

entries.name: Furious Gaze
entries.desc: When Eye Beam finishes fully channeling, your Haste is increased by an additional 8% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Dancing with Fate
entries.desc: The final slash of Blade Dance deals an additional 25% damage.

entries.name: Growing Inferno
entries.desc: Immolation Aura's damage increases by 10% each time it deals damage.

entries.name: Exergy
entries.desc: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat increase your damage by 5% for 20 sec.

entries.name: Inertia
entries.desc: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat cause your next Fel Rush or Felblade to empower you, increasing damage by 18% for 5 sec.

entries.name: Isolated Prey
entries.desc:
Chaos Nova, Eye Beam, and Immolation Aura gain bonuses when striking 1 target.

 Chaos Nova:
Stun duration increased by 2 sec.

 Eye Beam:
Deals 30% increased damage.

 Immolation Aura:
Always critically strikes.

entries.name: The Hunt
entries.desc: Charge to your target, striking them for 231 Chaos damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting 168 Chaos damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.

entries.name: Serrated Glaive
entries.desc: Enemies hit by Chaos Strike or Throw Glaive take 15% increased damage from Chaos Strike and Throw Glaive for 15 sec.

entries.name: Burning Wound
entries.desc:
Demon's Bite and Throw Glaive leave open wounds on your enemies, dealing 25 Chaos damage over 15 sec and increasing damage taken from your Immolation Aura by 35%.

May be applied to up to 3 targets.

entries.name: Unbound Chaos
entries.desc: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat increase the damage of your next Fel Rush or Felblade by 300%. Lasts 12 sec.

entries.name: Chaos Theory
entries.desc: Blade Dance causes your next Chaos Strike within 8 sec to have a 14-30% increased critical strike chance and will always refund Fury.

entries.name: Inner Demon
entries.desc: Entering demon form causes your next Chaos Strike to unleash your inner demon, causing it to crash into your target and deal 74 Chaos damage to all nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

entries.name: Chaotic Transformation
entries.desc: When you activate Metamorphosis, the cooldowns of Blade Dance and Eye Beam are immediately reset.

entries.name: Relentless Onslaught
entries.desc: Chaos Strike has a 10% chance to trigger a second Chaos Strike.

entries.name: Soulscar
entries.desc: Throw Glaive causes targets to take an additional 80% of damage dealt as Chaos over 6 sec.

entries.name: Ragefire
entries.desc:
Each time Immolation Aura deals damage, 35% of the damage dealt by up to 3 critical strikes is gathered as Ragefire.

When Immolation Aura expires you explode, dealing all stored Ragefire damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Know Your Enemy
entries.desc: Gain critical strike damage equal to 40% of your critical strike chance.

entries.name: Cycle of Hatred
entries.desc: Activating Eye Beam reduces the cooldown of your next Eye Beam by 2.5 sec, stacking up to 10 sec.

entries.name: Chaotic Disposition
entries.desc: Your Chaos damage has a 7.77% chance to be increased by 17%, occurring up to 3 total times.

entries.name: Essence Break
entries.desc: Slash all enemies in front of you for 108 Chaos damage, causing Chaos Strike and Blade Dance to deal 69 Chaos damage to them for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Glaive Tempest
entries.desc: The final slash of Blade Dance consumes 25 Fury when it strikes 3 or more enemies, launching two demonic glaives in a whirlwind of energy, causing 65 Chaos damage over 3 sec to all nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Shattered Destiny
entries.desc: The duration of your active demon form is extended by 0.1 sec per 12 Fury spent.

entries.name: Collective Anguish
entries.desc: Eye Beam summons an allied Vengeance Demon Hunter who casts Fel Devastation, dealing 92 Fire damage over 2 sec. Dealing damage heals you for up to 49 health.

entries.name: Screaming Brutality
entries.desc: Blade Dance automatically triggers Throw Glaive on your primary target for 100% damage and each slash has a 50% chance to Throw Glaive an enemy for 35% damage.

entries.name: A Fire Inside
entries.desc:
Immolation Aura has 1 additional charge, has 6 sec reduced cooldown, and deals Chaos damage instead of Fire.

You can have multiple Immolation Auras active at a time.

entries.name: Eternal Hunt
entries.desc: The Hunt empowers your next Eye Beam, increasing damage by 100% and affecting enemies in a wider area.

entries.name: Set Fire to the Pain
entries.desc:
5% of all non-Fire damage taken is instead taken as Fire damage over 6 sec.

Fire damage taken reduced by 10%.

entries.name: Improved Soul Rending
entries.desc: Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by 2% and an additional 2% while Void Metamorphosis is active.

entries.name: Demonic Intensity
entries.desc:
Activating Void Metamorphosis greatly empowers The Hunt.

Voidsurge damage is increased by 10% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active.

entries.name: Student of Suffering
entries.desc: Void Ray applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by 10.6% and granting 5 Fury every 2 sec, for 6 sec.

entries.name: Flamebound
entries.desc: Hungering Slash has 2 yd increased radius and 50% increased critical strike damage bonus.

entries.name: Untethered Fury
entries.desc: Maximum Fury increased by 20.

entries.name: Burning Blades
entries.desc:
Your blades burn with Cosmic energy, causing your Voidblade, Hungering Slash, and Throw Glaive to deal an additional 35% damage as Cosmic damage.

Reap damage increased by 20%.

entries.name: Monster Rising
entries.desc: Intellect increased by 15% while not in demon form.

entries.name: Violent Transformation
entries.desc:
Entering Void Metamorphosis resets the cooldown of Voidblade and The Hunt.

The Hunt deals 25% increased damage and resets the cooldown of Soul Immolation.

entries.name: Wave of Debilitation
entries.desc: Chaos Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades.

entries.name: Pursuit of Angriness
entries.desc: Movement speed increased by 1% per 10 Fury.

entries.name: Enduring Torment
entries.desc: The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Mastery: Monster Within's effectiveness by 20%.

entries.name: Demonsurge
entries.desc:
Void Metamorphosis now also greatly empowers Voidblade and Hungering Slash.

While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Voidsurge, causing you to explode with Void energy, dealing 2,359 Cosmic damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Focused Hatred
entries.desc:
Voidsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%.

entries.name: Volatile Instinct
entries.desc: Entering demon form causes your next Voidsurge to repeat after a short delay.

entries.name: Blind Focus
entries.desc:
Cosmic damage increased by 2%.

Effect is doubled while in demon form.

entries.name: Undying Embers
entries.desc: Soul Immolation has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.

entries.name: Incisive Blade
entries.desc: Soul Cleave deals 10% increased damage.

entries.name: Army Unto Oneself
entries.desc: Felblade surrounds you with a Blade Ward, reducing damage taken by 10% for 5 sec.

entries.name: Incorruptible Spirit
entries.desc: Each Soul Fragment you consume shields you for an additional 15% of the amount healed.

entries.name: Wounded Quarry
entries.desc: Expose weaknesses in the target of your Reaver's Mark, causing your Physical damage to any enemy to also deal 30% of the damage dealt to your marked target as Chaos, and sometimes shatter a Soul Fragment.

entries.name: Fury of the Aldrachi
entries.desc:
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Soul Cleave casts 3 additional glaive slashes to nearby targets. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

If cast after Shear, cast 6 slashes instead.

entries.name: Reaver's Mark
entries.desc:
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Shear applies Reaver's Mark, which causes the target to take 7% increased damage for 20 sec. Max 2 stacks.

Applies 1 additional stack of Reaver's Mark If cast after Soul Cleave.

entries.name: Bladecraft
entries.desc:
Fury of the Aldrachi further empowers Blade Dance when cast after Chaos Strike, increasing slashes to 12.

Reaver's Mark now stacks up to 2 times and further empowers Chaos Strike when cast after Blade Dance, applying an additional stack.

entries.name: Keen Engagement
entries.desc: Reaver's Glaive generates 20 Fury.

entries.name: Preemptive Strike
entries.desc: Throw Glaive deals 7 Physical damage to enemies near its initial target.

entries.name: Evasive Action
entries.desc: Vengeful Retreat can be cast a second time within 3 sec.

entries.name: Unhindered Assault
entries.desc: Vengeful Retreat resets the cooldown of Felblade.

entries.name: Aldrachi Tactics
entries.desc: The second enhanced ability in a pattern shatters an additional Soul Fragment.

entries.name: Art of the Glaive
entries.desc:
Consuming 20 Soul Fragments or casting Sigil of Spite converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive.

 Reaver's Glaive: 
Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing 134 Physical damage and ricocheting to 2 additional enemies.
 
Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next Shear and Soul Cleave.

The enhanced ability you cast first deals 10% increased damage, and the second deals 20% increased damage.

entries.name: Thrill of the Fight
entries.desc: After consuming both enhancements, gain Thrill of the Fight, increasing the damage of your next Reaver's Glaive by 30% and increasing Haste by 8% for 30 sec.

entries.name: Warblade's Hunger
entries.desc: Consuming a Soul Fragment causes your next Shear to deal 21 additional Physical damage.

entries.name: Keen Edge
entries.desc: Reaver's Glaive damage is increased by 20% and other Physical-only damage is increased by 10%.

entries.name: Broken Spirit
entries.desc: The Hunt shatters 1 Soul Fragment. Blade Dance and Chaos Strike have a 15% chance to shatter a Soul Fragment.
